checks.desc: The new reviews batch (page) header was added.
A new reviews table was created exactly once.
Schema now has exactly 4 tables (products, users, orders, reviews) — existing schema preserved plus the new table.
Exactly 20 review rows were added in the new batch.
Total seed rows are exactly 140 (120 from prior turns + 20 reviews). Catches collateral loss of the existing 120 rows when appending a new page.
The 39 orders (with prior edits) survive the new-section append.
The turn-4 bulk status edit ('shipped' x39) is still intact after adding the reviews page.
